info.title: Revo.Tools.DatabaseMigrator
info.description:
Event Sourcing, CQRS and DDD framework for modern C#/.NET applications.
.NET Core global tool for database migrations.

commands.name: preview
commands.description: Upgrades the database to newer version.

options.name: --connectionString
options.description:
Required. Connection string for the database
provider.

options.name: --databaseProvider
options.description:
Required. Used database provider. Currently
supported values are: Npgsql, SqlServer, SQLite.

options.name: --assemblies
options.description:
Assemblies containing NinjectModules to load.
Migrator will execute all migrations registered in
these modules.

options.name: --directoryPaths
options.description:
Directory paths to recursively search for migration
files. This is not needed when 'assemblies' are
specified. Finds any files matching the
'fileNameRegex'.

options.name: --fileNameRegex
options.description:
Regex for matching the names of files found when
specifying 'directoryPaths'. Default is:
^(?<module>[a-z0-9\-]+)(?:_(?<baseline>baseline))?(?
:_(?<repeatable>repeatable))?(?:_(?<version>\d+(?:\.
\d+)*))?(?:_(?<tag>[a-z0-9\-]+)(?:,(?<tag>[a-z0-9\-]
+))*)?\.sql$

options.name: --modules
options.description:
Names of modules to migrate. If empty, will migrate
all found modules. May also specify the target
version of every module and/or use wildcards like
this: 'mycompany-*@1.2.3'.;

commands.name: upgrade
commands.description: Upgrades the database to newer version.
